name: neovide
description: No Nonsense Neovim Client in Rust
readme_summary: Neovide is a graphical user interface (GUI) for the Neovim text editor, built in Rust. It aims to provide a smooth and visually enhanced experience by leveraging GPU acceleration, while maintaining functional parity with Neovim's terminal UI. It offers features like smooth scrolling and cursor animations for a more modern feel.
primary_use_case: To provide a feature-rich, visually enhanced graphical user interface for the Neovim text editor, offering a smoother and more modern user experience than traditional terminal interfaces.
cover_image_prompt: A sleek, modern window frame representing Neovim, with a vibrant, glowing cursor smoothly gliding across lines of code. Inside the window, the code transforms into a flowing river of digital information, with subtle GPU-accelerated particles emanating from the cursor's path. The background is a clean, minimalist workspace, hinting at a digital realm. Small, stylized icons representing smooth scrolling and visual enhancements are subtly integrated into the UI. The overall mood is futuristic and efficient. The image should be in a 3D isometric illustration style with a cool color palette and sharp, clean details, clearly depicting Neovide as a refined graphical layer for Neovim.

name: caligula
description: A user-friendly, lightweight TUI for disk imaging
readme_summary: Caligula is a lightweight, user-friendly TUI application for creating and verifying disk images. It offers features like disk listing, compression handling, hash validation, and post-write verification, all within a terminal interface.
key_features: Disk listing with size and model info
Compression support (gz, bz2, xz, lz4, zst)
primary_use_case: Creating, burning, and verifying disk images from a user-friendly terminal interface.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled artisan, dressed in a modern workshop apron, meticulously sculpting a perfect, glowing sphere (representing a disk image) from raw, unrefined clay (representing raw disk data). The artisan uses specialized, glowing tools that project intricate patterns of data and progress bars onto the sphere. In the background, a digital display subtly shows the 'Caligula' logo and a simplified, clean graph of the sculpting process. The scene is bathed in a warm, inviting light, emphasizing precision and user-friendliness. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic, focusing on the transformation of raw material into a flawless digital artifact.

name: oh-my-claudecode
description: Teams-first Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code
readme_summary: Oh-my-claudecode is a TypeScript-based tool that orchestrates multiple AI agents for Claude Code, aiming to simplify complex coding tasks. It provides a zero-learning-curve experience for users, allowing them to leverage advanced AI capabilities for code generation and automation through intuitive commands and workflows.
key_features: Intuitive CLI commands and in-session skills
Integration with Claude Code marketplace and npm
primary_use_case: To enable developers to efficiently use and manage multiple AI agents within the Claude Code environment for automated code generation and complex task completion without requiring extensive setup or learning.
cover_image_prompt: A conductor leading a symphony orchestra, but instead of musical instruments, the musicians are AI agents (represented by stylized robots and glowing orbs) and they are collaboratively composing lines of code on a giant, ethereal digital manuscript. The conductor, a friendly AI avatar, gestures with a glowing baton, directing the flow of code. Subtle streams of data connect the agents, showing parallel processing. The repository name 'oh-my-claudecode' is subtly etched on the conductor's podium. The scene is vibrant and futuristic, with a clean, organized composition, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with soft, glowing lighting.

name: EntraGoat
description: A deliberately vulnerable Microsoft Entra ID environment. Learn identity security through hands-on, realistic attack challenges.
readme_summary: EntraGoat is a deliberately vulnerable Microsoft Entra ID environment designed for security professionals to learn and practice identity security through hands-on attack simulations. It uses PowerShell and Microsoft Graph APIs to deploy intentional misconfigurations, offering multiple privilege escalation paths and black-box attack challenges.
key_features: Setup and cleanup scripts for scenarios
primary_use_case: Learning and practicing Microsoft Entra ID security by simulating real-world attack vectors and misconfigurations in a safe, isolated environment.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled locksmith, depicted as a digital avatar, is carefully examining a complex, glowing Entra ID castle gate. The avatar holds a set of specialized digital tools, subtly resembling PowerShell scripts and Graph API icons, as they probe for weak points. One section of the gate is visibly cracked, with a faint red glow emanating from within, representing a discovered vulnerability. Small, holographic screens around the avatar display abstract representations of user permissions and access logs. The overall scene is a 3D isometric illustration with a dark, futuristic aesthetic, emphasizing the challenge of navigating and securing digital identity infrastructure. The repository name 'EntraGoat' is subtly etched onto the locksmith's toolkit.

name: langextract
description: A Python library for extracting structured information from unstructured text using LLMs with precise source grounding and interactive visualization.
readme_summary: LangExtract is a Python library designed to extract structured information from unstructured text using Large Language Models (LLMs). It ensures precise source grounding for extracted data and offers interactive visualization of results, supporting various LLM providers including cloud-based and local models.
key_features: Precise Source Grounding: Maps every extraction to its exact location in the source text.
Reliable Structured Outputs: Enforces a consistent output schema using few-shot examples and controlled generation.
Optimized for Long Documents: Handles large documents through text chunking, parallel processing, and multiple passes.
Interactive Visualization: Generates self-contained HTML files for reviewing extracted entities in context.
Flexible LLM Support: Compatible with cloud LLMs (e.g., Gemini) and local models via Ollama.
Adaptable to Any Domain: Define extraction tasks with few-shot examples without model fine-tuning.
Leverages LLM World Knowledge: Influences extraction using prompt wording and examples.
primary_use_case: Extracting structured information from unstructured text documents with precise source grounding and interactive visualization, adaptable to various domains and LLM providers.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old librarian meticulously organizing a vast, chaotic library where books represent unstructured text. The librarian uses a magical magnifying glass that, when focused on a book, highlights specific sentences and pulls out glowing, perfectly formed data crystals (representing structured information) that float into labeled shelves. Subtle digital particles and faint code snippets drift in the background, hinting at the underlying technology. The scene is set in a warm, inviting study with soft lighting, rendered in a detailed 3D isometric illustration style, emphasizing clarity and order emerging from complexity.
